name: In Utah, what's different about workers comp for ladder falls at work?

mainEntity.name: In Utah, what's different about workers comp for ladder falls at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180-day report; state fund option; suits allowed.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Utah workers' comp covers ladder falls via no-fault system; report within 180 days, benefits up to 312 weeks.[1]

Third-party suits possible if negligence by others; local rules favor quick filing.[2]

- Use state fund if employer uninsured.
- Attorney fees capped.
- Murray-area firms know nuances.

File promptly; lawyer navigates Utah specifics.[3]

description: 180-day report; state fund option; suits allowed.[1]
